name: asia_london_range_breakout_xau_m5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the Asia-session (00:00-06:00 UTC) range, when sized 0.5-2.0 ATR, is broken during London (07:00-10:00 UTC) with continuation, yielding positive expectancy on the first breakout of the day.

signals.asia_range: high/low from 00:00 UTC to 06:00 UTC (72 M5 bars)
signals.entry_long: breakout_window AND close > asia_high + 0.5*atr(14) AND body >= 1.0*atr(14) AND first_breakout_of_day
signals.entry_short: breakout_window AND close < asia_low - 0.5*atr(14) AND body >= 1.0*atr(14) AND first_breakout_of_day

regime_filter.rationale: Skip days where Asia range is too tight (no fuel) or too wide (already exhausted).

entry_rules.confirmation: Close of breakout bar; enter next bar open.

falsification_criteria: trades < 200 OR PF < 1.4 OR divergence between local and MT5 >20%.
